AICARDMOD-ORACLE_TABLET_RELIC.title: Broken Scripture
AICARDMOD-ORACLE_TABLET_RELIC.descriptio: At the start of each combat, gain 3 Faith and trigger Revelation check.
AICARDMOD-ORACLE_TABLET_RELIC_UPGRADED_R: At the start of each combat, gain 6 Faith and trigger Revelation check. Each Revelation also draws 1 card.
